Room Sun Club 3 bedroom Family Suite Tropical View , 1 King Bed, 2 Double Beds and 3 Twin Beds: Full Board CXL charges apply as follows: STARTING 30/05/2026 CXL-PENALTY FEE IS 14.29% OF BOOKING PRICE.
STARTING 02/06/2026 CXL-PENALTY FEE IS 100.00% OF BOOKING PRICE.
